summary: Excellent newly restored audience recording captures a scorching‑hot “Good Lovin’”, delivering an upgrade of the decade.
review: The reviewer hails this version as a miracle, turning what was once a muddy, bass‑buzzing mess into crystal‑clear sound that lets the incendiary Good Lovin' shine. The performance is described as “scorching hot” and on a different level than any pre‑1971 Good Lovin’ tapes, making this release a must‑listen despite the unknown show date.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed, highly enthusiastic review praises both the dramatically improved recording quality and the exceptional performance of Good Lovin', warranting a high rating but confidence is medium due to limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Formerly described as muddy with bass buzzing, the new restoration is called a “miracle” – clear, balanced and able to showcase the hot Good Lovin' without distraction.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only Good Lovin' is specifically highlighted; the reviewer implies it dominates the show’s impact, making it the centerpiece of an otherwise unknown set.
